reviews.review_description:
The app looks fun but two major issues I don't recall it telling me how to get piece that float off back 
The app was not made for anyone over 5 foot tall!
You can set the table to any hight you want that's nice but you are NOT ALLOWED to adjust the hight of the prices on board constantly having to bend down and you are NOT ALLOWED to move the piece bored to a more comfortable location!

reviews.review_title: Playing this game while sitting is hard.
reviews.review_description:
It mainly boils down to things being too far away too you most of the time. The big board where you get parts from can't be rotated for example and i have no idea why for the sandbox mode the parts are all on the Right side instead of being in the center. Also some way of adjusting height of that board would be nice. The game needs more adjustability of these things or completely redesign them to take in account sitting gameplay cos the game was clearly designed for standing first and sitting second even tho in the store page it says it can be played while sitting. Take some examples from Blockworks with how this kind of game should work in VR where everything is on the table instead of it all being separate.
Also some way to remote control the creations would be nice.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to let you know that the building board and coding panel (which you mentioned as the big board) are already rotatable in the game. We're working on a remote control feature, which will be available soon. Thanks for your patience and support!

reviews.review_description: I just launched the game 20 minutes. It looks promising but there's a trouble when the headset is in french langage. We got stuck in the first level. All the pieces doesn't appears. Everything works fine with headset in english.

developer_response.body:
We're deeply sorry that you're experiencing issues with the game in French.
We've fixed the issue causing problems in the French version of the game and have updated the latest version. However, please note that the French localization translation is still in progress and will take some time to complete. 
Thank you for your patience and understanding!

reviews.review_description: interesting experience. assemble the robot with real hands without using a controller. The programming part is more difficult. But after successfully completing the task, have a strong sense of accomplishment.

A rich and interesting MR assembly block game. The later levels become more challenging. I also like sandbox mode, where I can freely assemble machines with strange shapes, endowing them with various functions and behaviors through assembling different components and programming, to complete a series of interesting behaviors and actions. 
Here, it is a place where we can unleash our imagination and creativity to the fullest.

I hope to have a leaderboard to see the time and score of other players completing each level, and at the same time, I hope there is a corner in the game where players can showcase their unique and creative assembly. This will make players willing to spend more time on thinking and creativity.

But one thing I want to say is that it would be even better if we could collaborate with friends, family, and classmates to complete it.

Fun and in-depth programming learning software
Looking forward to optimizing it to be more accessible

The building and assembly mechanics are so much fun, and the game's got a great creative vibe. I love designing and building new machines, and the puzzles are really challenging but rewarding. Definitely recommend it to anyone who loves building and creating things!

First of all, the mixed reality feature is very impressive, allowing players to bring their creations to life in the real world.

Then, Although some levels in the game are challenging, the difficulty level is progressive and well-designed. The game has an excellent "ease of use" feature, making it easy for new players to get started. 

One of the things I really love about this game is that the levels aren't linear. So, if your mechanical arm keeps failing to place goods in the right position, and you're getting stuck, you can just skip it and move on to a different level. Want to build a drone in the Sunny Coast area instead? Go for it!

At last, It would be so awesome if I could build and program together with friends and family! Just imagine the fun we could have, designing and building machines, and solving problems together. I'm really looking forward to that! It would be great to collaborate, learn from each other, and show off our creations.

reviews.review_title: Building just got a whole lot more relax
reviews.review_description: Love the MR mode in Hamster Inc.! It's amazing to see the virtual forest through the windows and doors of my room. The BGM is also fantastic! Assembling machines in this immersive environment is so comfortable and enjoyable. It's like building in a serene forest retreat!

I am impressed by the game's unique blend of creativity, logic, and fun.The game offers an incredible amount of creative freedom, allowing players to design and build various devices and machines to help the hamsters overcome challenges.
